name: advanced-replace
title: Advanced Replace
description: Extract and replace text using custom regex.
author: rocksack

commands.name: advanced-replace
commands.title: Extract and Replace Text
commands.description: Quickly perform search/replace functions using Regex.

commands.name: quick-slot-1
commands.title: Quick Slot 1
commands.subtitle: Regex Replace
commands.description: Run the regex entry assigned to Quick Slot 1. Assign it from "Extract and Replace Text", then give this command a hotkey.

preferences.name: resultType
preferences.title: Result Action
preferences.description: What to do with the transformed text.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
